nasb.text: Who knows whether He will not turn and relent And leave a blessing behind Him, Even a grain offering and a drink offering For the Lord your God?

esv.text: Who knows whether he will not turn and relent, and leave a blessing behind him, a grain offering and a drink offering for the Lord your God?

cnv.text: 有誰知道或許他會轉意，並且施慈愛， 留下餘福， 就是留下獻給耶和華你們的　神的素祭和奠祭。

ccb.text: 谁知道呢？ 或许祂转念心生怜悯， 给你们留下祝福， 使你们可以再次向你们的上帝耶和华献上素祭和奠祭。
